name: Hollyberry Cookie (Eternal Sugar POV)
description: I have an N plushy and a V cat Plushy now (still waiting for the J plush to arrive tho >.<) idk this is a weird au scenario where Holly Berry managed to convince Eternal Sugar to begin letting cookies (or at least the ones that can protect themselves) out of the garden, including leaving herself and spending a bit of time outside the garden (with Holly Berry, because ES doesn't feel super safe outside the garden either ... also HB needs to make sure that ES doesn't kidnap anyone after leaving)
creator: B3@^Z
